# cati: Communities Assembly by Traits: Individuals and beyond

[![GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/graphics/gplv3-127x51.png)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl.html)
[![Travis-CI Build
Status](https://app.travis-ci.com/adrientaudiere/cati.svg?branch=master)](https://app.travis-ci.com/adrientaudiere/cati)
[![CRAN by
month](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/cati?color=red)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=cati)
[![CRAN
Total](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/cati?color=yellowgreen)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=cati)
[![DOI](https://zenodo.org/badge/19670/adrientaudiere/cati.svg)](https://zenodo.org/badge/latestdoi/19670/adrientaudiere/cati)

## A R package to detect communities assembly processes by functionnal traits

The package is described in *Ecography*: **[cati: an R package using
functional traits to detect and quantify multi-level community assembly
processes](http://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/ecog.01433/pdf)**.

### Install the latest versions of all dependencies from CRAN:

``` r
install.packages(c("devtools", "e1071", "mice", "rasterVis", "hypervolume", "cluster", "geometry", "vegan", "nlme", "ade4", "ape"))
```

### Install cati’s current development version from Github:

``` r
devtools::install_github("adrientaudiere/cati")
```

### Install cati’s cran version:

``` r
install.packages("cati")
```

### Attach the package and you are ready to start:

``` r
library(cati)
```

There’s a
**[tutorial](https://github.com/adrientaudiere/cati/blob/Package-cati/Documentation/vignette_Darwin_finches/vignette.pdf)**
which illustrate the cati package using Darwin finches data.

## How to cite?

“Taudiere, A. and Violle, C. (2016), cati: an R package using functional
traits to detect and quantify multi-level community assembly processes.
Ecography. doi: 10.1111/ecog.01433”

# Package index

## All functions

- [`AbToInd()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/AbToInd.md)
  : Internal function. Transform abundance data matrix into individual
  like matrix.
- [`funky.col()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Auxiliary.functions.rd)
  : Auxiliary functions
- [`CVNND()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/CVNND.md)
  [`MNND()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/CVNND.md)
  [`MinNND()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/CVNND.md)
  [`SDNND()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/CVNND.md)
  [`SDND()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/CVNND.md)
  [`MND()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/CVNND.md) :
  Coefficient of variation, mean, minimum and standard deviation of the
  nearest neigbourhood distance.
- [`ComIndex()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndex.md)
  [`plot(`*`<ComIndex>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndex.md)
  [`print(`*`<ComIndex>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndex.md)
  [`summary(`*`<ComIndex>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndex.md)
  : Computing metrics to test and quantify the non-random assembly of
  communities
- [`ComIndexMulti()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndexMulti.md)
  [`plot(`*`<ComIndexMulti>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndexMulti.md)
  [`print(`*`<ComIndexMulti>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndexMulti.md)
  [`summary(`*`<ComIndexMulti>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ComIndexMulti.md)
  : Computing multitraits metrics to test and quantify the non-random
  assembly of communities
- [`Fred()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Fred.md) :
  Functional richness, evenness and divergence following Villeger et al.
  2008
- [`IndexByGroups()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/IndexByGroups.md)
  : Apply metrics to groups.
- [`MinMaxMST()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/MinMaxMST.md)
  : Ratio of the shortest distance to the longest distance in a minimum
  spanning tree
- [`Pval()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Pval.md) :
  Calcul of p-value for object of class Tstats, ComIndex, ComIndexMulti
  and listofindex
- [`RandCom()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/RandCom.md)
  : Toy model to simulate internal and/or external filtering
- [`RaoRel()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/RaoRel.md)
  : Alpha, gamma and beta-components for taxonomic, functional and
  phylogenetic diversity
- [`SumBL()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/SumBL.md)
  : Sum of branch length of a classification dendrogram (Petchey and
  Gaston, 2002)
- [`Tstats()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Tstats.md)
  [`sum_Tstats()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Tstats.md)
  [`ses.Tstats()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Tstats.md)
  [`barplot(`*`<Tstats>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Tstats.md)
  [`plot(`*`<Tstats>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Tstats.md)
  [`print(`*`<Tstats>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Tstats.md)
  [`summary(`*`<Tstats>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/Tstats.md)
  : Computing observed T-statistics (T for Traits) and null
  expectations.
- [`as.listofindex()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/as.listofindex.md)
  : Transform index results in a list of index
- [`cati`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/cati-package.md)
  [`cati-package`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/cati-package.md)
  : cati: Community Assembly by Traits: Individuals and Beyond
- [`decompCTRE()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/decompCTRE.md)
  [`barplot(`*`<decompCTRE>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/decompCTRE.md)
  : Variance partitioning for multiple traits
- [`finch.ind`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/finch.ind.md)
  : Finch morphological data
- [`partvar()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/partvar.md)
  [`barPartvar()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/partvar.md)
  [`piePartvar()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/partvar.md)
  : Variance partitioning accross nested scales
- [`plot(`*`<listofindex>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/plot.listofindex.md)
  : Plot community assembly index
- [`plotCorTstats()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/plotCorTstats.md)
  : Plot the bivariate relationships between T-statistics
- [`plotDistri()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/plotDistri.md)
  : Plot function to represent density of trait values
- [`plotRandtest()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/plotRandtest.md)
  : Plot result of observed indices values against null distribution
- [`plotSESvar()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/plotSESvar.md)
  : Plot SES values against a variable
- [`plotSpPop()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/plotSpPop.md)
  : Plot populations values against species values
- [`plotSpVar()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/plotSpVar.md)
  : Plot populations values against species values
- [`samplingSubsetData()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/samplingSubsetData.md)
  : Sampling subset of data.
- [`ses()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ses.md) :
  Standardized effect size and confidence interval for a matrix of
  statistics
- [`ses.listofindex()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/ses.listofindex.md)
  : Standardized effect size for a list of index.
- [`traitflex.anova()`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/traitflex.anova.md)
  [`plot(`*`<traitflex>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/traitflex.anova.md)
  [`print(`*`<traitflex>`*`)`](https://adrientaudiere.github.io/cati/reference/traitflex.anova.md)
  : Variance decomposition for a given trait used in decompCTRE
